commit.subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: refactor osd_read()/write()
commit.message:
LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: refactor osd_read()/write()

Currently, osd_read()/write() are implemented using
cfs_kernel_read()/write(). This introduces a requirement
to periodically flush orphaned file descriptors created
by osd_alloc_file_pseudo().

To avoid this, we can access the page cache pages directly
(similar to the bulk read/write path). This allows us to
remove osd_alloc_file_pseudo() and the related delayed
fput() flushing code.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity fstype=wbcfs mdscount=4 mdtcount=1 osscount=4 ostcount=1
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity fstype=wbcfs combinedmdsmgs=false standalonemgs=true mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=4 ostcount=1
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I73a742676bcda107f72440d8b92f07d486d1313c
